ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the trial */,
  "reciprocate" INTEGER /* Indicator if reciprocation occurs (1/0) */,
  "partner" INTEGER /* Partner ID involved in the trial */,
  "iti" INTEGER /* Inter-trial interval duration */,
  "cleft" INTEGER /* Left cue duration */,
  "isi" REAL /* Inter-stimulus interval duration */,
  "cright" INTEGER /* Right cue duration */,
  "ran" INTEGER /* Randomization flag */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of presentation */,
  "onset" REAL /* Onset time for trial */,
  "bpress" INTEGER /* Button press duration */,
  "resp" INTEGER /* Response code */,
  "resp_onset" REAL /* Response onset time */,
  "highlow" TEXT /* High/low condition indicator */,
  "rt" REAL /* Response time measured */,
  "isipad" REAL /* ISI padding duration */,
  "isi_onset" REAL /* Onset time for ISI */,
  "isi_offset" REAL /* Offset time for ISI */,
  "outcome_onset" REAL /* Onset time for outcome */,
  "outcome_offset" REAL /* Offset time for outcome */,
  "duration" REAL /* Total duration of the trial */,
  "iti_onset" REAL /* Onset time for ITI */,
  "iti_offset" REAL /* Offset time for ITI */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the trial */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus used in the trial */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., completed, in progress, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_stimulus_type FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_type") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_partner FOREIGN KEY ("partner") REFERENCES partners ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner */,
  "partner_description" TEXT /* Description or name of the partner */,
  "partner_type" TEXT /* Type of partner (e.g., human, AI) */,
  "partner_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the response */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the response given by the participant */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken for the response in seconds */,
  "response_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the response (e.g., correct, incorrect) */,
  "response_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the participant in their response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the trial */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being conducted */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End timestamp of the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, assistant) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition under which trials are run */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., cognitive, environmental) */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)
